name: hermes-gateway
description: OctoBus package for Hermes gateway health, webhooks, messaging, diagnostics, and read-only operations.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/HealthCheck.name: health-check
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/HealthCheck.description: Call the configured Hermes health endpoint.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/SendWebhook.name: send-webhook
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/SendWebhook.description: POST a JSON webhook payload to an allowed Hermes path.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/SendMessage.name: send-message
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/SendMessage.description: Send a message through Hermes to an allowed target.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/TestMcpServer.name: test-mcp-server
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/TestMcpServer.description: Test a configured Hermes MCP server.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/ListTools.name: list-tools
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/ListTools.description: List Hermes toolsets for a platform.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/EnableTools.name: enable-tools
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/EnableTools.description: Enable Hermes toolsets for a platform.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/DisableTools.name: disable-tools
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/DisableTools.description: Disable Hermes toolsets for a platform.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/CreateWebhookSub.name: create-webhook-subscription
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/CreateWebhookSub.description: Create a Hermes dynamic webhook subscription.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/TestWebhookSubsc.name: test-webhook-subscription
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/TestWebhookSubsc.description: Test a Hermes dynamic webhook subscription.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/RemoveWebhookSub.name: remove-webhook-subscription
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/RemoveWebhookSub.description: Remove a Hermes dynamic webhook subscription.

hermes.v1.HermesGateway/RunCronJob.name: run-cron-job
hermes.v1.HermesGateway/RunCronJob.description: Run a Hermes cron job on next scheduler tick.
